mapper.select: select category_id from car_category_relation where car_id = #{carId}
select c.*, b.name as brand_name from car c left join car_brand b on c.brand_id = b.id where c.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into car ( brand_id, model, seats, gear, energy, year, price, stock, status, rating, review_count, tag, mileage, displacement, description, image, features, configs, pickup_location, return_location ) values ( #{brandId}, #{model}, #{seats}, #{gear}, #{energy}, #{year}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{status}, #{rating}, #{reviewCount}, #{tag}, #{mileage}, #{displacement}, #{description}, #{image}, #{features, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=com.example.handler.JsonListHandler}, #{configs, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=com.example.handler.JsonListHandler}, #{pickupLocation}, #{returnLocation} )
mapper.update: update car set brand_id = #{brandId}, model = #{model}, seats = #{seats}, gear = #{gear}, energy = #{energy}, year = #{year}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, status = #{status}, rating = #{rating}, review_count = #{reviewCount}, tag = #{tag}, mileage = #{mileage}, displacement = #{displacement}, description = #{description}, image = #{image}, features = #{features, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=com.example.handler.JsonListHandler}, configs = #{configs, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=com.example.handler.JsonListHandler}, pickup_location = #{pickupLocation}, return_location = #{returnLocation} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select * from car_brand
name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by sort_order, create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into car_brand (name, sort_order, status) values (#{name}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.select: select count(*) from car where brand_id = #{brandId}

select * from car_category
name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by sort_order, create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into car_category (name, code, sort_order, status) values (#{name}, #{code}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.select: select count(*) from car_category_relation where category_id = #{categoryId}
select c.*, b.name as brand_name from car c left join car_brand b on c.brand_id = b.id where c.id = #{id}

select c.id, c.brand_id, c.model, c.seats, c.gear, c.energy, c.year, c.price, c.rating, c.review_count, c.tag, c.image, c.features, b.name as brand_name from car c left join car_brand b on c.brand_id = b.id where c.status = 'available' order by c.review_count desc, c.rating desc limit #{limit}

select c.id, c.brand_id, c.model, c.seats, c.gear, c.energy, c.year, c.price, c.rating, c.review_count, c.tag, c.image, c.features, b.name as brand_name from car c left join car_brand b on c.brand_id = b.id where c.status = 'available' order by c.rating desc, c.review_count desc limit #{limit}
select id as value, name as label from car_brand where status = 1 order by sort_order, name
select distinct energy from car where status = 'available' and energy is not null order by energy
select distinct seats from car where status = 'available' and seats is not null order by seats
